response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed the entire video for visual content and audio. 2. Identified the content as a slideshow of fan messages and concert logistical information for the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert. 3. Listened carefully to the audio to check for vocal music. 4. Confirmed that the background music throughout the video is purely instrumental and contains no vocals. 5. Constructed the JSON object reflecting the lack of vocal music in any of the identified scenes.
response.global_summary: A video presentation containing fan messages, safety guidelines, and merchandise information for the Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis "Drawn to Dawn" concert. The entire audio track is instrumental background music, with no vocal songs detected.

scenes.description: Introduction slideshow featuring fan messages for the concert.
A static screen announcing that the concert will be starting soon.
An 'Attention for Visitors' screen displaying safety guidelines.
A presentation showing information about the 2nd round of concert merchandise sales.
A scrolling series of fan messages and illustrations for the concert.
A repetition of the previous informational screens and message slideshows.
